title: Bucket not empty reproduction (Buckets)
summary: Resolve "bucket not empty" — reproduction for the Buckets surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Buckets surface fails with an error matching "bucket not empty (reproduction)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Buckets API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
